title: podman exec, with no args, exits 255
body:
```console
$ podman run -d --name foo quay.io/libpod/testimage:20240123 top
d65a49e7f6511a1e4d77f8de912c9b9524d18dfcc1e11f0c23a7280d56288fa5
$ podman exec foo
Error: must provide a non-empty command to start an exec session: invalid argument
$ echo $?
255
```
Seems weird. I would expect 126, but 125 is also cool. `podman-remote` exits 125.
